name: accounting-firm-cpa
description: US public-accounting / CPA-firm operations team — 5 agents covering firm economics (realization, utilization, leverage, capacity, service-line mix), tax-season workflow (1040/1120/1065, extensions, review tiers, e-file), Client Accounting Services (monthly close-as-a-service, bookkeeping, controller-as-a-service, tech stack), attest engagements (planning, PBC lists, risk assessment, workpapers, independence), and advisory/CAS upsell (pricing, packaging, client advisory). Ships 3 skills (tax-season-workflow, client-accounting-services, engagement-and-workpaper-management), 3 commands, 2 templates, a decision-tree knowledge bank, 6 best-practices, an advisory anti-pattern hook, and a firm-economics calculator. Inherits ravenclaude-core protocols.
